senses.definition: someone, especially a man, who cheats on their partner with another person

examples.x: Jack thought he had found the love of his life, but soon discovered that his girlfriend, Emma, was a love rat.
Mark's reputation as a love rat spread quickly among his social circle, as he had a long history of cheating on his partners.
Michelle ended her relationship with Tom when she discovered he had been a love rat, having secret affairs behind her back.

senses.definition: love that is fake, dishonest, and motivated by the hopes of gaining something

examples.x: Sally suspected that her friend's compliments were just cupboard love because they were always followed by requests for favors or borrowing money.
Sheila suspected her boyfriend of having cupboard love as he showered her with gifts and attention whenever he needed a favor.

senses.definition: a person, typically a woman, who enters into a romantic relationship with someone solely for financial gain

examples.x: Charlotte's friends warned her about the guy she was dating, saying he had a reputation for dating wealthy women and being a gold digger.
John's family had concerns about his fiancée, suspecting she might be a gold digger who was after his inheritance.

senses.definition: to frequently look at other people, often in a romantic or sexual way, despite being in a committed relationship

examples.x: Alice's husband had a roving eye, always checking out other women even when they were out together.
The new employee in the office quickly gained a reputation for having a roving eye, constantly flirting with colleagues and making romantic advances.

senses.definition: a young person's strong, yet brief feeling of love toward someone

examples.x: Their puppy love quickly faded as they grew older and went their separate ways.
The summer camp romance was a classic case of puppy love.
Many people look back on their teenage crushes as puppy love.
He reminisced about his first puppy love with a smile, knowing it was just a phase.
Their puppy love was sweet, but it didn’t survive the test of time.

senses.definition: free to do as one pleases without having any attachments, particularly romantic ones

examples.x: After finishing college, Emily decided to travel the world and live a footloose and fancy-free lifestyle, exploring different countries and cultures.
Mark recently got divorced and is now footloose and fancy-free.

word_list.pronunciation: ɡɛt ɡˌoʊ tə fˈɜːst bˈeɪs wɪð ˌɛsbˈiː

senses.definition: to reach a stage of intimacy in one's relationship by kissing one's partner on the lips

examples.x: After a few flirty exchanges, Mark finally got to first base with Becki when he leaned in and gave her a gentle kiss on the lips.

senses.definition: to reveal private or intimate details about a romantic or sexual relationship with someone, especially without the consent of the other person involved

examples.x: Amanda ended her relationship with Josh when she discovered his habit of kissing and telling, realizing that he valued attention and validation more than their privacy and trust.
Jane regretted her decision to kiss and tell about her night with Tom, as the rumors spread quickly and ruined her reputation.

senses.definition: a private, often secret, place where two people in a romantic relationship spend time together without anyone disturbing them

examples.x: After getting married, Sophia and Josh decided to create their own love nest, a cozy apartment where they could build a life together.
Alex surprised his partner by transforming their spare room into a romantic love nest, complete with candles, rose petals, and soft music.

senses.definition: a man who has an intimate relationship with a woman who is already in a committed relationship or marriage, often without the knowledge of the partner

examples.x: Isabella suspected that her partner was a backdoor man when she discovered secret messages on their phone from another woman.
The tabloids were quick to label the famous actor as a backdoor man after rumors circulated about his affairs with multiple co-stars.

senses.definition: a man who is very charming, attractive, and popular among women, often having many romantic relationships

word_list.pronunciation: tˈeɪk ɔːɹ nˈiːd ɐ kˈoʊld ʃˈaʊɚ

senses.definition: used to advise someone to calm down and regain control after experiencing sexual excitement

examples.x: After watching that steamy movie scene, John felt the need to take a cold shower to cool down.
The sight of the attractive lifeguard on the beach was enough to make Tom feel like he needed a cold shower to calm his racing heart.
